textByHash.4ccdf2a5ff506086039dc6c87f3ccfefd61bceac: How can you not know? YOU MUST KNOW! It is of course the shrine!
textByHash.8faf58ff43ac5dbcc43b0018ca043b89f290f9f5: Do you not listen? It is the shrine to almighty one! BWAAAAAAAK!
textByHash.8c46be93da61ddb3b6169ec47af12656d3e05f1c: DO NOT defy him! Give him your eggs! So colourful! So beautiful!
